ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "range_freq" TEXT /* Frequency range of the test (e.g., 2G, 5G) */,
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antenna used in the test */,
  "wifi_standard" TEXT /* Wireless standard used (e.g., 802.11g, 802.11n) */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Modulation and Coding Scheme (MCS) used */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the test (in MHz) */,
  "channel" INTEGER /* Channel number used in the test */,
  "power_limit" TEXT /* Power limit range for the test */,
  "power_actual" REAL /* Actual power level measured during the test */,
  "evm_max" REAL /* Maximum Error Vector Magnitude (EVM) for the test */,
  "evm_actual" REAL /* Actual Error Vector Magnitude (EVM) measured during the test */,
  "freq_error" INTEGER /* Frequency error measured during the test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "test_config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test configuration used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time when the test was performed */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_rate FOREIGN KEY ("rate") REFERENCES modulation_schemes ("mcs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_bandwidth FOREIGN KEY ("bandwidth") REFERENCES bandwidths ("bandwidth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_wifi_standard FOREIGN KEY ("wifi_standard") REFERENCES wifi_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_range_freq FOREIGN KEY ("range_freq") REFERENCES frequency_ranges ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_antenna_id FOREIGN KEY ("antenna_id") REFERENCES antennas ("antenna_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antennas" (
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna */,
  "antenna_model" TEXT /* Model of the antenna */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of the antenna (e.g., Omnidirectional, Directional) */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the antenna (in dBi) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the antenna */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the antenna */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the antenna was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antenna_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wifi_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wireless standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the wireless standard (e.g., 802.11g, 802.11n) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wireless standard */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range supported by the standard (e.g., 2.4 GHz, 5 GHz) */,
  "max_data_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum data rate supported by the standard (in Mbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modulation_schemes" (
  "mcs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modulation and coding scheme */,
  "mcs_name" TEXT /* Name of the modulation and coding scheme (e.g., MCS7) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modulation and coding scheme */,
  "modulation_type" TEXT /* Type of modulation used (e.g., QPSK, QAM) */,
  "coding_rate" TEXT /* Coding rate used (e.g., 1/2, 3/4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency range (e.g., 2G, 5G) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency range */,
  "min_frequency" REAL /* Minimum frequency of the range (in GHz) */,
  "max_frequency" REAL /* Maximum frequency of the range (in GHz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidths" (
  "bandwidth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth */,
  "bandwidth_value" INTEGER /* Value of the bandwidth (in MHz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bandwidth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bandwidth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_number" INTEGER /* Number of the channel */,
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency range the channel belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., engineering, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the tag is associated */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_tags_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to which the note is associated */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration to which the version belongs */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id")
)
